title: French Tomato Quiche
description: A rich and satisfying quiche filled with fresh tomatoes and cheese, perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: Roll out pastry dough and place in a 9-inch tart pan.
In a large skillet, sauté diced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add diced tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, heavy cream, and grated cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Pour the egg mixture over the tomatoes and onions in the skillet.
Pour the egg mixture into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
